name: Make It Stable - Kids & Family Fun!

reviews.review_description: What the title says
Please make it multi-playable in co-location MR.
Where is the setting to mute music? Now with the ability to have a browser open, there should be a way to mute the sound for better multitasking.
Good game

reviews.review_title: A Fun and Addictive Stacking Challenge!
reviews.review_description:
Make It Stable is an absolute blast! The goal is simple: stack everyday objects to build the tallest tower possible, but the twist is in the adorable eyes each object has, giving them tons of personality. Some objects, like microwaves with swinging doors or buckets with handles, add a fun challenge with their moving parts.

The physics feel spot-on, making each wobble exciting as you carefully balance your stack. It’s cute, creative, and surprisingly addictive—perfect for quick sessions or longer play. Highly recommended for anyone who loves casual physics games!

reviews.review_title: Best free game I've played in VR
reviews.review_description: This game is a nice surprise for me. It has a very funny and addictive gameplay. It feels like a casual mobile game but improved with a mixed reality experience. I would recommend it to people from any age and it's very good to introduce kids to XR games. It's intuitive and easy to play, but it gets challenging in the harder levels.

reviews.review_title: Just music forever. Game NOT working
reviews.review_description:
The update wasnt working but 3 weeks later and its bery nice
 Working great. Fun.

developer_response.body: Hello whitefieldlibrary, thanks for taking the time to update your review! We hope you enjoy Make It Stable :)

reviews.review_description: Yes

I never knew stacking stuff could be so addictive. This is a very tactile experience that rewards creative thinking, plus it's so cute too! I love what I have played, and I can't wait to get back into it.
It combines real-world physics with virtual elements to create challenges. The game looks (and sounds) great! a lot of fresh levels, and not easy at all!

reviews.review_title: A very fun game for the whole family
reviews.review_description: In our home we love skill games and this one is perfect for everyone! The premise is quite simple: try to do the highest tower with different objects. There are daily challenges that add more difficulty with special rules like a countdown. We have shown this game to friends and family at home and everyone had a laugh (it's also funny to see how other people play). On top of that, the art style is super cute!

reviews.review_title: Thanks to this game I'll study a degree
reviews.review_description:
Before playing Make It Stable I had to pick up the sink every day. Now I can do a jenga by placing pots and pans on glasses and plates, cutlery, my dog, the child's toys, the car and my father-in-law without anything falling.

I don't know if being able to do that has given me quality of life, but it's fun and I feel ready to share a student apartment again.

reviews.review_title: Stacking Fun for the Whole Family!!
reviews.review_description:
Make It Stable is a fun and family-friendly MR game that challenges players to stack colorful shapes and build the tallest tower possible. The vibrant graphics and simple controls make it easy for all ages to join in the fun.

What makes this game truly addictive is the thrill of balancing the shapes while competing for the highest tower. 

If you're looking for an entertaining MR experience that combines strategy and fun, Make It Stable is a must-try!

Make It Stable is a game that perfectly blends fun and challenge into a totally addictive experience. From the start, the premise of stacking objects to build the tallest tower seems simple, but the realistic physics and unique mechanics make it truly captivating. Every game forces you to think strategically, control your nerves, and use creativity to balance the tower without everything collapsing.

What I love the most is the variety of interactive objects and different mechanics introduced in each level. Whether you're playing in Campaign Mode or competing in the Daily Challenge, there's always something new to learn and master. The hand-tracking works amazingly well, making the experience even more immersive! And the best part is, there’s no pressure from failed attempts; it’s relaxing yet has just the right amount of challenge to keep you pushing for better results.

This game is perfect whether you're looking to unwind by building or feel competitive enough to climb the leaderboards in daily challenges. I highly recommend it to anyone who enjoys physics-based skill games! I can’t wait to see what new levels and worlds they add in the future.

I'm a loyal player of Odders' games, and this title is a breath of fresh air in their small but excellent catalog. Besides its great visual design, with vibrant colors and adorable pieces, the game's physics are spot-on, adding an interesting and addictive challenge. You have to be really meticulous to get through certain levels, which makes it both a relaxing yet challenging game. Very chill and fun, highly recommended! :)
It's a wonderful game, it's addictive, when you think you can't go any further, you manage to build a higher tower.

You get to stack real-sized objects to build towers, and it’s way more challenging than it sounds. The MR experience is super engaging, and the handtracking works great, making the gameplay smooth and enjoyable. Also, it has a ton of different objects to choose from, you’ll have plenty of options to get creative while trying to create the tower from each level.

I was very surprised by this game. With a first glance at the mechanics, I thought it was going to be a very easy and quick game, but very quickly it gets challenging and really interesting, which makes it really addictive and makes you lose the sense of time! The design is also super cozy and cute, which makes you less angry when you see all of your tower fall apart hahaha

I didn’t expect to get this hooked, but is seriously addictive. It feels so good to play, and the cute graphics make it even better. Looks like they’re adding new DLCs with different objects, so I’m definitely in.

reviews.review_title: A challenge of patience and wit
reviews.review_description: Its simple premise and easy initial levels hides a more puzle-like approach that tests the player skills and planning, as many of the latter levels require a bit of thinking out of the box to get the target height. This really shines on the daily challenge, as the timer puts extra pressure to make the highest tower. Even if it can be a bit hard sometimes, the funny expressions on each piece makes me laugh each time they fall.
